reasoning: The canonical_wildlife_sites block directly addresses the wild-dolphin-swim intent with three authoritative curated entries (Mikurajima QID Q1183194, Ogasawara QID Q243869 both offering swim; Amakusa QID Q865762 correctly flagged watch-only).
